name: air-drow
description: AIR-DROW Input, Language & Hand Startup Edition — reliable mobile text entry, language-safe runtime UI, and honest local hand-engine startup.

scripts.verify:source: npm run icons:sync && npm run icons:verify && npm run icons:local:verify && npm run preflight && npm run check && npm run model:verify && npm run release:verify && npm run production:verify && npm run localization:verify && npm run input-language-hand:verify
scripts.verify:deploy-output: npm run hand-loader:verify && npm run deploy-build:verify
scripts.build: npm run verify:source && npm run build:static && npm run verify:deploy-output
scripts.vercel:build: npm run model:verify && npm run build
